---
title: "Konferansebidrag"
---

## Muntlig presentasjon – Helsinki 2025

**Title: Loneliness in Young Adults: The Role of NEET Status and Social Determinants in Norway**   
**The 18th European Public Health Conference**, Helsinki, Finland, 11 – 14 November 2025

```{=html}
<iframe src="doc/oral_helsinki.pdf" width="100%" height="800px"></iframe>
``` 

## Poster – Harstad 2026

**Title: Pathways Out of NEET: Profiling Young Adults Using Registry Data**   
**The 11th Nordic Health Promotion Research Conference**, Harstad, Norway 10.06.2026-12.06.2026

```{=html}
<iframe src="doc/poster_harstad.pdf" width="100%" height="800px"></iframe>
```
